import os
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib

matplotlib.rcParams.update({
    'font.family': 'sans-serif',
    'font.sans-serif': ['Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'],
    'font.size': 14,
    'axes.titlesize': 16,
    'axes.labelsize': 15,
    'xtick.labelsize': 13,
    'ytick.labelsize': 13,
    'legend.fontsize': 13,
    'figure.dpi': 300,
    'savefig.dpi': 300,
    'axes.spines.top': False,
    'axes.spines.right': False,
    'axes.grid': True,
    'grid.alpha': 0.3,
    'figure.figsize': (15, 5)
})

os.makedirs("figures", exist_ok=True)

def safe_load(path):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        try:
            return np.load(path, allow_pickle=True)
        except Exception:
            return None
    return None
